title: Tunisian Duck Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish from Tunisia, made with duck and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the duck breast and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
3. Remove the duck from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add the onion, bell pepper, and zucchini to the skillet. Cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
5. Add the stir-fry sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
6. Return the duck to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
8. Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
9. Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
